conversation.customer:
Subject: Inquiry About Thermoforming Machines

Hi,

I'm Mike Chen from PackForm Solutions, a sustainable packaging startup based in Toronto. We're looking to invest in our first thermoforming machine and came across your company, Machinecraft Technologies, while researching our options.

We don't have any thermoforming experience and want to make sure we invest wisely. Could you please provide more information on your thermoforming machines that suit our needs? Specifically, we're looking for a machine that can handle a forming area of 600 x 900 mm, a depth of 300 mm, and a material thickness of up to 3mm. We plan to use materials like PETG and rPET.

Also, can you give us an idea of the pricing for machines that fit these specifications? Our budget is around USD 60,000, so we want to ensure we stay within that range.

Looking forward to your guidance.

Best regards,
Mike Chen
Founder, PackForm Solutions
